production.write_policy: pipeline-only write; controlled immutability/versioning; expiry and legal hold configured during accepted production activation
production.read_policy: Alexandre-only reads; D08 designated-not-activated pending notification, acceptance, provisioning, and recovery validation

durability: unproven; sandbox policy accepted but unprovisioned and exact-SW-gated; production unprovisioned and D08-gated; this template creates no live claim
